description: DescriptionGrey, slim Fit 100% cotton t-shirt, with cartoon print FittingSlim WashcareSoft wash to avoid shrinkingGrab that old bike of yours and set off on that bumpy ride to the countryside on a warm, summer day. After all, summer's all about fun and frolick. Pair this grey t-shirt from probase with denims and you're all set to hit the road. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5'11 ft, Shoulders-18"
